records.directionFromStop: Demand-responsive; direction determined by booked journey
records.stopSpecificDestination: Booked destinations within the North East Braintree DaRT 3 operating area
records.typicalWeekdayBusesPerHour: No fixed frequency; journeys operate on demand subject to availability
records.saturdayBusesPerHour: No fixed frequency; journeys operate on demand subject to availability

serviceQualifications.peak: No fixed peak timetable. Journey times are agreed through the booking process and remain subject to vehicle availability.
serviceQualifications.evening: The service operates until 20:00 Monday to Saturday, subject to an accepted advance booking.
serviceQualifications.seasonal: No service on Sundays or bank holidays. Bookings must normally be made by 18:00 on the preceding operating day; Monday journeys must be booked by 18:00 on Saturday.

records.servicePattern: Flexible demand-responsive transport rather than a conventional fixed-route service. Passengers book an available journey between eligible locations within the DaRT 3 North East Braintree operating area.
records.journeyOpportunities: Provides booked travel between Steeple Bumpstead and eligible settlements including Haverhill-area rural communities, Great Yeldham, Halstead, Sudbury and other locations listed within the DaRT 3 operating area, subject to booking acceptance and availability.
records.transportStatementParagraph: The Broad Green stops are covered by the DaRT 3 demand-responsive service, which operates between 06:00 and 20:00 Monday to Saturday. Journeys have no fixed timetable or hourly frequency and must be booked in advance, subject to vehicle availability.
